name: service_status
description: Check systemd service health: active/inactive/failed status and recent logs
command: for svc in {{services}}; do echo "=== $svc ==="; systemctl is-active "$svc" 2>/dev/null; systemctl is-enabled "$svc" 2>/dev/null; journalctl -u "$svc" -n 3 --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -3; echo ''; done
